chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1686 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 28-10-2025 Muhammad Iqbal Gopang (petitioner) present in person. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** Learned AAG submits that the petitioner himself appeared before the Anti-Encroachment Tribunal by filing Application No.26 of 2020 (re: Muhammad Iqbal v. Commissioner, Sukkur and others), which was allowed vide order dated 20.08.2020 with certain directions. We have verified the record of this petition, wherein at page 21 (Annexure- C), the petitioner has also annexed a copy of the said order. The petitioner, however, has not approached the said Tribunal for execution of its own order and has directly filed the instant petition, which, being not maintainable, is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
